forbidden_capabilities: model weights, GGUF or archives committed to Git
accepted S3 object or version deletion
benchmark, model admission, runtime activation or production-readiness claim
reuse of original files as clean restore evidence
bundle upload before exact-main release, storage preflight and conversion evidence pass
local materialization of the complete immutable archive before upload
acceptance: owner-only exact-main command triggers fail-closed finalization
conversion report and all five GGUF outputs match exact SHA-256 and size
the v2 verifier treats bundle_archive as external immutable-object metadata rather than a required local payload file
Qwen and Mistral payload indexes are deterministic and complete
archives are hashed and then streamed to content-addressed versioned S3 objects without a local archive duplicate
Object Lock COMPLIANCE retention is at least 90 days
each exact object version is streamed into a clean restore root one model at a time with safe-member enforcement
verify_bundle_storage_v2 returns VERIFIED with reasons=[] for both models
only bounded locator and verification metadata enter GitHub artifacts
benchmark remains NOT_RUN, admission remains NOT_DONE and production status remains NOT_ATTESTED
